Variables.Name: EventTrack
Variables.Description: Array of events to fire off.

Variables.Name: bFireEventsWhenForwards
Variables.Description: If events should be fired when passed playing the sequence forwards.

Variables.Name: bFireEventsWhenBackwards
Variables.Description: If events should be fired when passed playing the sequence backwards.

Variables.Name: bFireEventsWhenJumpingForwards
Variables.Description: If true, events on this track are fired even when jumping forwads through a sequence - for example, skipping a cinematic.

Variables.Name: bUseCustomEventName
Variables.Description: If checked each key's event name is the exact name of the custom event function in level script that will be called
